<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|image=<%~ it.icon %>
|image_alt=<%~ it.name %> icon
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox character
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
<% if (it.employeeID) { -%>
|employee_id=<%~ it.employeeID %>
<% } -%>
|index=<%= it.index %>
|playable=<%~ it.isPlayable %>
<% if (it.maxLevel) { -%>
|max_level=<%= it.maxLevel %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.minUnlockLevel) { -%>
|min_unlock_level=<%= it.minUnlockLevel %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.skinCount) { -%>
|skin_count=<%= it.skinCount %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.defaultAbility) { -%>
|default_ability=<%~ it.defaultAbility %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.primaryColor) { -%>
|primary_color=<%~ it.primaryColor %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.textColor) { -%>
|text_color=<%~ it.textColor %>
<% } -%>
}}<section end="infobox" />
<% if (it.hasSkillTreeImage) { %>
<section begin="skill_tree_map" />
<%~ it.skillTreeImage -%>
<section end="skill_tree_map" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasSkillTree) { %>
<section begin="skill_tree" />
<%~ it.skillTreeSection -%>
<section end="skill_tree" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.upgradesSection) { %>
<section begin="upgrades" />
<%~ it.upgradesSection -%>
<section end="upgrades" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasDropOnlyUpgrades) { %>
<section begin="drop_only_upgrades" />
<%~ it.dropOnlyUpgradesSection -%>
<section end="drop_only_upgrades" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasSkins) { %>
<section begin="skins" />
<%~ it.skinsSection -%>
<section end="skins" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasQuips) { %>
<section begin="quips" />
<%~ it.quipsSection -%>
<section end="quips" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Characters]]
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated character source pages]]
